title: Questions for Bashar the Grey Alien-Human hybrid from the future 2/2

transcript.text: Hello, this video is questions for Bashar part two.
I figure I'll do another one because I'm the only person out there doing questions for Bashar on YouTube.
That's pretty cool, plus somebody wrote me and said that, so I thought that was cool.
So anyways, so my first question for Bashar.
Hi Bashar, how's it going?

I would like to know, Bashar, you say that right now you are helping 27 planets transition into, I guess, what would you call it, utopia, intergalactic federation, at this very moment, along with the Earth.
And you say that you live 500 light years away from the Earth, in the direction of Orion.
So does that mean that you are working, you're helping planets in a 500 light year radius of your planet?
So then does that mean that there's 27 planets in a thousand light year radius of your planet?
Now, the galaxy is 100 light years in diameter, so that's 100 times the diameter of your influence of helping planets.
So does that mean there's 270 planets in the galaxy right now transitioning into intergalactic federation status?
And I also ask you, how many planets in this galaxy are there where there's humans, hominids that look like us, living in the third dimension, the dimension we're in?
And also, how many planets are there in the Magellanic Clouds, those little galaxies on the outskirts of our galaxy?
And also, there's another thing you said that I find extremely puzzling.
You say that sometimes when you die, you have the choice to live again, continue your life as if you never died.
But you would remember something weird about it, like, how did I survive that accident, but in reality I didn't?
Now, does that mean that I created a new, my own fantasy world and nobody else in that world exists?
Or does that mean that I just warp-drived into another parallel universe where I actually magically survived that accident and everybody does exist?
I just, I just, that was just another crazy parallel universe where I just did survive.
So, I guess the second one makes sense, huh?
So anyways, those are the two questions that I have to ask this time.
Okay.
